text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Welcome back... Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Welcome back... Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I'm a little embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if the blue rose from the picture book
felt like this, too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, yeah. Remember the story of The Blue Rose of Good Fortune?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, yeah. Remember the story of The Blue Rose of Good Fortune?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...The blue rose is placed on the big brother's
windowsill to cheer up the people walking past.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...The blue rose is placed on the big sister's
windowsill to cheer up the people walking past.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I've learned so much these past three years and
made new discoveries along the way... even in this
book I've read so many times.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Until now, I thought that the windowsill was the
best place for that rose to be seen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But... now I think that the windowsill was the best place for the rose to see...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
From there, I bet it could see the big brother
whenever he came home.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
From there, I bet it could see the big sister
whenever she came home.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And I'm sure it always waited excitedly... to spend
time with the person it loved the most.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Can I ask you a question?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Can I ask you a question?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Have I blossomed as well? Do I... deserve a place
on the windowsill?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I... I want to continue to bloom with you by my
side... forever and ever!
